creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi, 

Sorry to hear you are having issues upgrading. 

Please move (or remove) /usr/obj from your system, and retry 
the buildworld process as described in the Handbook: 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/makeworld.html 

Otherwise, please follow up on the current@freebsd.org list, as the 
PR system is not intended for general issues such as this. 

Thanks!
